overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student wizard exploring a Hogwarts-style castle. The character moves from a decorated common room through staircases to a dormitory, then transitions to a dark underground crypt area with ancient stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel passage leading to common room

events.description: exits the circular stone tunnel and enters the large common room

agents.ego_description: walking through a circular stone tunnel into a brightly lit common room

entered.detail: rough-hewn grey stone tunnel with circular arch framing the view
large stone fireplace with warm fire visible in the common room ahead
tall gothic archway leading into the main common room space

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a narrow circular stone tunnel looking out toward a bright common room. The character walks forward and transitions from the enclosed tunnel into the open space of the common room, with a large fireplace visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with fireplace and student seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room past other students sitting by the fireplace and standing in groups

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair reading near the fireplace
group of students in dark robes standing and conversing near the center

entered.detail: vertical red and gold banners hanging from the high ceiling
decorative wall tapestries with heraldic designs and nature scenes
tables and chairs arranged for student seating

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic common room with high ceilings, passing by a large stone fireplace on the right where students sit in armchairs. Colorful house banners hang from above, and the room is filled with wooden furniture and decorative tapestries.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase landing with Christmas decorations and stained glass windows

events.description: begins ascending the wooden staircase toward the upper levels

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden stairs toward a large decorated Christmas tree near stained glass windows

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking down the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall decorated evergreen tree with red ornaments and lights near the windows
tall arched windows with colorful stained glass panels
carved wooden stairs with decorative banister leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden staircase decorated for winter, with a large Christmas tree visible at the landing near tall stained glass windows. Another student walks down the stairs in the opposite direction as the camera moves upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase in stone tower with narrow windows

events.description: enters the narrow spiral stone staircase from the main wooden landing

agents.ego_description: climbing the winding spiral stone staircase upward through the tower

entered.detail: winding stone steps with carved stone balustrade spiraling upward
rough grey stone walls with narrow vertical windows letting in light
medieval-style lanterns mounted on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow spiral staircase made of grey stone, winding upward through the tower. The space is enclosed with rough stone walls and narrow windows, lit by wall-mounted lanterns as the character continues ascending.

scene_state.functional_zone: student dormitory with four-poster beds and wooden wardrobes

events.description: opens wooden door and enters the circular dormitory room
screen fades to black as character approaches the bed

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory room and walking toward a four-poster bed with red curtains

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with iron studs that opens into the room
wooden bed with red curtains and a white owl perched nearby
tall carved wooden wardrobe with hanging robes visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character opens a heavy wooden door and enters a circular dormitory room with wooden floors and multiple windows. The room contains four-poster beds, wooden wardrobes, and house banners hanging from the ceiling. The character approaches a bed before the screen fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient underground crypt with stone columns and torch lighting

events.description: scene transitions from dormitory to dark underground crypt after fade to black
UI text 'Hufflepuff Edith Diggory' appears at bottom of screen

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit underground crypt exploring the ancient stone corridors and staircases

entered.detail: vast underground chamber with high vaulted ceilings and ancient stone architecture
tall fluted stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
burning torches mounted on the stone walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: After a fade to black, the scene shifts to a dark underground crypt illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The character explores the ancient stone corridors with tall columns and arched ceilings, walking over debris-strewn floors. UI text identifies the character as 'Hufflepuff Edith Diggory'.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the warm, festive interiors of a wizarding school to the cold depths of an ancient underground crypt. It begins within a narrow stone tunnel, moving forward into a spacious gothic common room filled with house banners, wooden furniture, and a large fireplace where students gather. As the camera ascends a winter-decorated wooden staircase past a Christmas tree and stained glass windows, the environment shifts into a tight, lantern-lit spiral stone tower. The movement then leads through a heavy wooden door into a circular dormitory featuring four-poster beds and wardrobes before a fade to black transitions the scene into a dark, torch-lit crypt. Finally, the camera explores these subterranean corridors, passing tall columns and debris-strewn floors as the character is identified as Hufflepuff Edith Diggory.
